actions.value: We have heard several reports of Jaxx users attempting to restore their wallets with a fake/phishing site, located at: myjaxx[.]pro - this bad tool appears to be automatically emptying any cryptocurrency associated with a 12-word seed phrase that's been submitted to it. We've researched the webhost, and recommend that you send a formal abuse complaint to: https://tilda.cc/abuse, and proceed with filing a local police report of the theft. This will get something on the record, and assist the authorities in being able to track down the criminal behind this site.
